item.title: A message from Guidance:
item.description: Students still working on their 40 volunteer hours are encouraged to check the Teams for approved opportunities or speak with a Guidance Counsellor for help getting started.

item.title: A message from Mr. D'Alessio:
item.description: There will be a debate team meeting tomorrow at 10:35 in Rm.209

item.title: A message from Ms. Dawson:
item.description: There will be a Dungeons and Dragons Club starting for Grades 7&8. Beginners and experienced players are all welcome. Beginners are invited to stop by room 142 at the beginning of lunch recess Friday, March 13 to build character sheets. Campaigns for beginners and experienced players will start after March Break.

item.title: A message from the main office:
item.description: A reminder to grade 7 & 8 students, the morning recess will be indoor this morning. Lunch outdoor recess will look a bit different, due to the ongoing construction. 7/8 students will exit and re-enter for the lunch recess out the front doors of the school and proceed to the area near the bus loop

item.title: A message from M. Benoit:
item.description: There will be a meeting in room 247 for both 7&8 hockey teams at 11:20 today!

item.title: A message from Mme. Bourdon:
item.description: There will be a student council meeting during morning break. All council members are to meet Mme Bourdon at her office. Please bring your coat since we will be going outside if it isn't raining.

item.title: A message from Ms. Clouthier.
item.description: There will be a 7&8 Boys Basketball practice on Thursday after school until 4:00pm. Please make sure you have a ride home
